title: openfile

flags.name: -h <anything>
flags.description: sets to hyperlink (GUI) mode, 1st element is file to open and name to display, further arguments overwrite display.

methods.description: opens folder/file/weblink specified by the symbol, if no symbol is given, the current folder is opened

body: [openfile] can be used to open folders and files in your computer and also weblinks.
